title: Penalty
doc_html:
§77.  Penalty

Willful violation of any provisions of this Chapter shall be a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not more than one hundred dollars and each violation shall be a separate offense.  

Added by Acts 1978, No. 751, §1.
doc_text:
§77.  Penalty
Willful violation of any provisions of this Chapter shall be a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not more than one hundred dollars and each violation shall be a separate offense.
Added by Acts 1978, No. 751, §1.
